title: Fusion Reactor Component Failures: A Review of Historical Non-Thermonuclear Energetic Excursions
description: Historical review of six major non-thermonuclear energetic excursions in experimental magnetic confinement fusion devices (TFR, TFTR, JET, JT-60U, Tore Supra/WEST, JT-60SA). Covers relativistic runaway-electron damage, pulsed-power machinery failures, vertical displacement events and halo currents, and high-voltage/cryogenic faults in superconducting magnet systems. Readable PDF: zenodo.pdf. Source manuscript and build scripts: https://github.com/catskillsresearch/fusion_reactor_component_failures
notes: Primary readable artifact is zenodo.pdf. Markdown source is arxiv.md in the linked GitHub repository.
